title: Which Cate Blanchett Character Are You, Actually?
dek: One woman, eight icons, zero chill — answer honestly and find out whether you're a queen, a goddess, or a woman quietly unraveling on a park bench.

quiz.intro: No wrong answers here — just go with your gut and let the chaos (or the composure) reveal itself.

questions.question: Your best friend is spiraling before a huge life decision. What's your move?

answers.text: Offer calm, almost otherworldly wisdom, then let them choose their own path
Tell them to stop hesitating and just take what's theirs
Coach them so intensely they either rise to the occasion or crumble
Remind them survival sometimes means becoming someone completely new

questions.question: A rival is trying to take something that's rightfully yours. How do you handle it?

answers.text: Destroy anyone standing between me and my throne
Manipulate the situation quietly from behind the podium
Play the political long game until they underestimate me fatally
Outwork and outcharm them until I win it fair and square

questions.question: How would you describe your love life, honestly?

answers.text: Hopelessly entangled with ambition and control
Sacrificed for duty, deliberately and permanently
Fierce, independent, and allergic to convention
Forbidden, and worth risking my whole life for

questions.question: There's tension in your workplace. What's your leadership style?

answers.text: Outmaneuver every rival with cool political calculation
Dazzle everyone with talent and simply refuse to be dismissed
Hold my composure publicly while quietly plotting my own exit
Melt down the second things stop going my way

questions.question: Picture your worst professional downfall. How does it go?

answers.text: I refuse to let scandal or setback stop me for even a second
I lose status and custody, but choose authenticity anyway
I spiral into a very public, very messy unraveling
I disappear completely, then quietly rebuild somewhere far away

questions.question: You walk into a big, glamorous party. What actually happens?

answers.text: I catch someone's eye across the room and the world falls away
I talk too much, drink too much, and unravel by dessert
I hide in a corner and dread every second of small talk
I sense everyone's deepest fear without saying a single word

questions.question: How do you actually make big decisions?

answers.text: I decide based on whatever protects my image in the moment
I avoid deciding until the walls close in, then I bolt
I weigh centuries of consequence before I ever act
I act first and ask questions never

questions.question: If people talked about your reputation behind your back, what would they say?

answers.text: "Brilliant but reclusive, and completely misunderstood"
"A quiet legend, whispered about for centuries"
"Feared, infamous, and clearly enjoying it"
"A genius on paper, a cautionary tale in practice"

questions.question: How do you handle family when things get complicated?

answers.text: I guide from a distance with ancient, hard-earned wisdom
I reject my family's legacy entirely and seize power my own way
I keep family tangled up with career and control, always
I put the crown before kin, every single time

questions.question: Pick the title that belongs on your imaginary biopic poster.

answers.text: "Goddess of Death"
"The Maestro"
"The Virgin Queen"
"The Original Rebel"

results.name: Galadriel
results.subtitle: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
results.description: You're ancient wisdom in human form — calm, watchful, and quietly more powerful than anyone in the room realizes. When temptation is dangled right in front of you, you're the rare person who actually says no and walks away intact.

results.name: Hela
results.subtitle: Thor: Ragnarok (2017)
results.description: You don't ask for power, you take it — loudly, dramatically, and without a shred of apology. Conflict doesn't scare you, it energizes you, and anyone who underestimates you learns that lesson exactly once.

results.name: Lydia Tár
results.subtitle: Tár (2022)
results.description: You're brilliant, controlling, and a little bit terrifying to work under. You built an empire on talent and total command of every room — and if it ever comes crashing down, it'll be because of exactly that.

results.name: Queen Elizabeth I
results.subtitle: Elizabeth (1998)
results.description: You know exactly what has to be sacrificed to hold real power, and you make peace with it. You entered the room naive and left it having outsmarted absolutely everyone, even if it meant becoming someone colder along the way.

results.name: Katharine Hepburn
results.subtitle: The Aviator (2004)
results.description: You're fiercely independent, endlessly charismatic, and allergic to being told what you can't do. You break rules just by being yourself in a room full of people who expected you to fall in line.

results.name: Carol Aird
results.subtitle: Carol (2015)
results.description: You're composed, elegant, and quietly defiant underneath it all. When it comes down to a choice between playing it safe and being honest about who you love, you'll choose honesty — even knowing exactly what it might cost you.

results.name: Jasmine
results.subtitle: Blue Jasmine (2013)
results.description: You derive your worth from how others see you, and when that image cracks, it cracks spectacularly. You're glamorous, self-destructive, and impossible to look away from, even at your absolute worst.

results.name: Bernadette Fox
results.subtitle: Where'd You Go, Bernadette (2019)
results.description: You're a genius who got buried under everyone else's expectations, and you're one bad day away from just disappearing entirely. Give you enough space (or one trip to Antarctica) and your real, brilliant self comes roaring back.

sources.title: In 'Tár,' Cate Blanchett delivers a tour de force as a musical genius corrupted by power - NBC News
"Carol" Offers A Rare Ending For A Lesbian Romance - BuzzFeed News
'Where'd You Go, Bernadette' Review: A Woman Rediscovers Her True Calling - NPR
